ns0:entry.ns0:title: Anxcye/anx-reader
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Anxcye/anx-reader
Language: dart
Featuring powerful AI capabilities and supporting various e-book formats, it makes reading smarter and more focused.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: AppFlowy-IO/AppFlowy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/AppFlowy-IO/AppFlowy
Language: dart
Bring projects, wikis, and teams together with AI. AppFlowy is the AI collaborative workspace where you achieve more without losing control of your data. The leading open source Notion alternative.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: DataDog/dd-sdk-flutter
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/DataDog/dd-sdk-flutter
Language: dart
Flutter bindings and tools for utilizing Datadog Mobile SDKs

ns0:entry.ns0:title: KaringX/karing
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/KaringX/karing
Language: dart
Simple & Powerful proxy utility, Support routing rules for clash/sing-box

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Solido/awesome-flutter
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Solido/awesome-flutter
Language: dart
An awesome list that curates the best Flutter libraries, tools, tutorials, articles and more.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ViscousPot/GitSync
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ViscousPot/GitSync
Language: dart
Mobile Git client for syncing a repository between remote and a local directory

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cake-tech/cake_wallet
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cake-tech/cake_wallet
Language: dart
The open source repository for Cake Wallet, a noncustodial multi-currency wallet, and Monero.com, a noncustodial Monero-only wallet. Need help? Check out https://docs.cakewallet.com

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dart-lang/sdk
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dart-lang/sdk
Language: dart
The Dart SDK, including the VM, JS and Wasm compilers, analysis, core libraries, and more.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ente-io/ente
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ente-io/ente
Language: dart
💚 End-to-end encrypted cloud for everything.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: flutter/flutter

URL: https://github.com/flutter/flutter
Language: dart
Flutter makes it easy and fast to build beautiful apps for mobile and beyond

ns0:entry.ns0:title: flutter/samples
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/flutter/samples
Language: dart
A collection of Flutter examples and demos

ns0:entry.ns0:title: foss42/apidash
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/foss42/apidash
Language: dart
API Dash is a beautiful AI-powered open-source cross-platform (Desktop & Mobile) API Client built using Flutter which can help you easily create & customize your HTTP & GraphQL API requests, visually inspect responses and generate API integration code. A lightweight alternative to postman/insomnia.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: getsentry/sentry-dart
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/getsentry/sentry-dart
Language: dart

ns0:entry.ns0:title: localsend/localsend
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/localsend/localsend
Language: dart
An open-source cross-platform alternative to AirDrop

ns0:entry.ns0:title: zarzet/SpotiFLAC-Mobile
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/zarzet/SpotiFLAC-Mobile
Language: dart
Mobile version of SpotiFLAC written in Flutter, powered by a Go backend for high performance. Download Tracks in true FLAC from Tidal, Qobuz, & Amazon Music - no account, no ads, no subscription.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: zjs81/meshcore-open
ns0:entry.ns0:content:

Language: dart
